title: aqua hazel
description: Aqua Hazel lenses blend hazel tones with a soft aqua or blue-green tint, creating a natural yet vibrant eye color. They offer a subtle, refreshing look with depth and brightness, ideal for enhancing the natural eye color.

title: blue lens
description: Blue lenses give the eyes a striking, vivid blue hue. They can range from bright, bold blue to softer, more natural-looking shades. Blue contact lenses are great for a dramatic change or enhancing natural eye color with a cool, refreshing tone.

title: brown lens
description: Brown lenses give the eyes a warm, rich brown color. They can range from light honey tones to deeper, darker browns, enhancing natural eye color or creating a soft, natural look with added depth and warmth.

title: cat eye lens
description: Cat eye lenses are designed to give the eyes a dramatic, bold look, often featuring a slanted or angular shape that mimics the sharp, elongated appearance of a cat's eyes. They typically have an enlarged, exaggerated iris with a unique, striking design, perfect for creating a mysterious or edgy aesthetic. These lenses are popular in cosplay, fashion, or for those looking to make a bold statement with their eye makeup.

title: coffee brown lens
description: Coffee brown lenses offer a warm, rich brown color with a slightly deeper, more intense tone than standard brown lenses. They create a natural yet vibrant look, adding depth and dimension to the eyes with a soft, subtle gradient effect. These lenses are perfect for those who want a warm, earthy eye color that enhances their natural beauty.

title: golden yellow lens
description: Golden yellow lenses give the eyes a striking, bright yellow or amber hue with a golden shimmer. They create an eye-catching, bold look, often used for dramatic or fantasy-inspired styles. These lenses are perfect for adding a unique, luminous effect to your eyes, making them stand out with a warm, glowing appearance.

title: gray lens
description: With water gradient technology, these lenses are super comfortable, providing a smooth transition from the core to the outer surface.

title: pink lens
description: Designed for all-day comfort, these lenses are ideal for dry or sensitive eyes, providing a high level of moisture..

title: purple lens
description: Monthly contact lenses that offer great comfort, even in low-humidity environments. They're also designed to retain moisture throughout the day.

title: red lens
description: Known for their ability to maintain moisture, these lenses are designed for users with dry eyes.

title: sepia lens
description: Offers high hydration and a comfortable fit with UV protection for day-long wear.

title: Sterling silver
description: Affordable, comfortable lenses that provide clear, stable vision and are great for daily wear.

title: sunset lens
description: Soft, daily lenses offering clear vision and all-day comfort, ideal for people with sensitive eyes..

title: topaz lens
description: These lenses provide outstanding comfort, moisture, and fresh, clear vision all day long.

title: turquoise lens
description: These lenses correct astigmatism while providing superior comfort and moisture throughout the day.
